law.text:
SECTION II. - INTENTIONAL KILLING, NOT CALLED MANSLAUGHTER, AND INTENTIONAL INFLICTING OF BODILY INJURY.

  Art. 398. Whoever intentionally inflicts wounds or blows shall be punished with imprisonment from eight days to six months and a fine from twenty-six [euro] to one hundred [euro], or with one of those punishments alone.
  In case the offender acted with premeditation, he shall be sentenced to imprisonment from one month to one year and a fine from fifty [euro] to two hundred [euro].

  Art. 399. If the blows or wounds result in illness or incapacity to perform personal labor, the offender shall be punished with imprisonment from two months to two years and a fine from fifty [euro] to two hundred [euro].
  The offender shall be punished with imprisonment from six months to three years and a fine from one hundred [euro] to five hundred [euro] if he acted with premeditation.

  Art. 400. The penalty is imprisonment from two years to five years and a fine from two hundred [euro] to five hundred [euro] if the blows or wounds cause an incurable appearing disease, incapacity to perform personal labor for more than four months, complete loss of use of an organ, or a severe mutilation.
  The penalty is imprisonment from five years to ten years if the offender acted with premeditation.

  Art. 401. When the blows or wounds are intentionally inflicted, but without the intention to kill, and nevertheless cause death, the offender shall be punished with imprisonment from five years to ten years.
  He shall be punished with imprisonment from ten years to fifteen years if he commits those acts of violence with premeditation.

kb_used.fo:
vocabulary V {
  type Person
  intentionalInfliction: Person -> Bool
  premeditated: Person -> Bool
  causesIllnessOrIncapacity: Person -> Bool
  causesIncurableDiseaseOrSevereHarm: Person -> Bool
  causesDeathWithoutAimToKill: Person -> Bool
  imprisonmentMinDays: Person -> Int
  imprisonmentMaxDays: Person -> Int
  fineMinEuro: Person -> Int
  fineMaxEuro: Person -> Int
  hasFine: Person -> Bool
}

theory T:V {
  ! p in Person:
    intentionalInfliction(p) & ~premeditated(p) & ~causesIllnessOrIncapacity(p) & ~causesIncurableDiseaseOrSevereHarm(p) & ~causesDeathWithoutAimToKill(p) =>
      imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 8 &
      imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 183 &
      fineMinEuro(p) = 26 &
      fineMaxEuro(p) = 100 &
      hasFine(p).

  ! p in Person:
    intentionalInfliction(p) & premeditated(p) & ~causesIllnessOrIncapacity(p) & ~causesIncurableDiseaseOrSevereHarm(p) & ~causesDeathWithoutAimToKill(p) =>
      imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 30 &
      imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 365 &
      fineMinEuro(p) = 50 &
      fineMaxEuro(p) = 200 &
      hasFine(p).

  ! p in Person:
    intentionalInfliction(p) & causesIllnessOrIncapacity(p) & ~premeditated(p) & ~causesIncurableDiseaseOrSevereHarm(p) & ~causesDeathWithoutAimToKill(p) =>
      imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 60 &
      imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 730 &
      fineMinEuro(p) = 50 &
      fineMaxEuro(p) = 200 &
      hasFine(p).

  ! p in Person:
    intentionalInfliction(p) & causesIllnessOrIncapacity(p) & premeditated(p) & ~causesIncurableDiseaseOrSevereHarm(p) & ~causesDeathWithoutAimToKill(p) =>
      imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 180 &
      imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 1095 &
      fineMinEuro(p) = 100 &
      fineMaxEuro(p) = 500 &
      hasFine(p).

  ! p in Person:
    intentionalInfliction(p) & causesIncurableDiseaseOrSevereHarm(p) & ~premeditated(p) & ~causesDeathWithoutAimToKill(p) =>
      imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 730 &
      imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 1825 &
      fineMinEuro(p) = 200 &
      fineMaxEuro(p) = 500 &
      hasFine(p).

  ! p in Person:
    intentionalInfliction(p) & causesIncurableDiseaseOrSevereHarm(p) & premeditated(p) & ~causesDeathWithoutAimToKill(p) =>
      imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 1825 &
      imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 3650 &
      ~hasFine(p).

  ! p in Person:
    intentionalInfliction(p) & causesDeathWithoutAimToKill(p) & ~premeditated(p) =>
      imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 1825 &
      imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 3650 &
      ~hasFine(p).

  ! p in Person:
    intentionalInfliction(p) & causesDeathWithoutAimToKill(p) & premeditated(p) =>
      imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 3650 &
      imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 5475 &
      ~hasFine(p).

  ! p in Person:
    (imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 8 | imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 30 | imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 60 | imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 180 | imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 730 | imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 1825 | imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 3650).

  ! p in Person:
    (fineMinEuro(p) = 26 | fineMinEuro(p) = 50 | fineMinEuro(p) = 100 | fineMinEuro(p) = 200) <=> hasFine(p).

  ! p in Person:
    (fineMaxEuro(p) = 100 | fineMaxEuro(p) = 200 | fineMaxEuro(p) = 500) <=> hasFine(p).
}

case.text: During a football match, Tom tackles his opponent Lars hard but within the rules. Lars falls and breaks his leg. He cannot work for two months. Tom did not act with premeditation. The tackle was intentional (a normal tackle), but not intended to cause injury outside the game.

pipeline.natural_language: No. Tom is does not satisfy intentionalInfliction. (If you expected Yes, ensure case facts use the exact predicate names from the KB schema.)
No. Tom is does not satisfy causesIllnessOrIncapacity. (If you expected Yes, ensure case facts use the exact predicate names from the KB schema.)
No. Lars is does not satisfy intentionalInfliction. (If you expected Yes, ensure case facts use the exact predicate names from the KB schema.)
